members.name: _Instantiate
members.summary: Override this method to customize the [AudioEffectInstance] created when this effect is applied on a bus in the editor's Audio panel, or through [method AudioServer.add_bus_effect]. [codeblock] extends AudioEffect @export var strength = 4.0 func _instantiate(): var effect = CustomAudioEffectInstance.new() effect.base = self return effect [/codeblock] [b]Note:[/b] It is recommended to keep a reference to the original [AudioEffect] in the new instance. Depending on the implementation this allows the effect instance to listen for changes at run-time and be modified accordingly.
